description: Lock the 2026-06-25 riveting correction that scopes the industrial node to Tweddell-era hydraulic riveting rather than pneumatic tools or early suspension-bridge dependency laundering.

checks.reason: Grace's Guide anchors the corrected node to hydraulic riveting with pumps and accumulators, not compressed-air pneumatic tools.
The current suspension-bridge scope and date should not depend directly on the later 1860s hydraulic riveting node.
